# aikido_clouds (Data Source)

Lists all connected cloud environments in the Aikido workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aikido_clouds" "all" {}

# Look up a cloud by name
locals {
  production_aws = one([for c in data.aikido_clouds.all.clouds : c if c.provider_name == "aws" && c.environment == "production"])
}

# Link it to a team
resource "aikido_team_resource_link" "cloud" {
  team_id       = aikido_team.platform.id
  resource_type = "cloud"
  resource_id   = local.production_aws.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clouds` (Attributes List) The list of cloud environments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clouds))

<a id="nestedatt--clouds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clouds`

Read-Only:

- `environment` (String) The deployment tier (e.g., production, staging, development, mixed).
- `external_id` (String) The native identifier from the cloud provider.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud environment.
- `name` (String) The name of the cloud environment.
- `provider_name` (String) The cloud provider (e.g., aws, gcp, azure).
